channel.title: Sullivan County, Tennessee — County News
channel.description: Official news and announcements from Sullivan County, Tennessee government.

item.title: County Offices Closed Monday, May 25 for Memorial Day
item.description: All Sullivan County government offices will be closed Monday, May 25, 2026 in observance of Memorial Day. Offices reopen Tuesday, May 26 at 8:00 AM. Emergency services and 911 dispatch are not affected.
item.dc:creator: County Mayor's Office

item.title: Grand Opening: Blountville Athletic Park Opens Saturday, May 9
item.description: Sullivan County will officially open the new Blountville Athletic Park to the public on Saturday, May 9, 2026. The County Mayor's office invites residents to attend the ribbon-cutting ceremony and family activities.
item.dc:creator: Sullivan County Communications

item.title: Public Hearing on the 2026-2027 County Budget Set for May 21
item.description: The Sullivan County Board of Commission will hear public comment on the proposed Fiscal Year 2026-2027 budget at its regular May session on Thursday, May 21 at 6:00 PM at the historic courthouse in Blountville.
item.dc:creator: County Mayor's Office

item.title: Outdoor Burn Permits Required Through May 15
item.description: Anyone planning to burn leaves, brush, or yard debris in Sullivan County must obtain a free burn permit from the Tennessee Division of Forestry through May 15, 2026. Permits take about a minute to obtain at BurnSafeTN.org or in the MyTN app.
item.dc:creator: Sullivan County Communications

item.title: Memorial Boulevard (SR 126) Improvement Project: What to Expect This Spring
item.description: Phase 1 of the long-planned Memorial Boulevard (SR 126) improvement project began in March 2026. The 8.3-mile project runs from East Center Street in Kingsport to Interstate 81. Drivers should expect daytime lane closures through the spring.
item.dc:creator: Sullivan County Communications

item.title: April Commission Meeting: 2026 Budget Discussions, Road Project Updates
item.description: The Sullivan County Board of Commission held its regular April session Thursday at the historic courthouse in Blountville. Commissioners reviewed the proposed 2026-2027 budget, received road project updates, and approved routine measures. The next regular session is scheduled for May 21.
item.dc:creator: County Mayor's Office

item.title: Spring Severe Weather: How Sullivan County Residents Can Prepare
item.description: April and May are the peak months for severe thunderstorms and tornadoes in Tennessee. Sullivan County Emergency Management urges every household to have a plan, a kit, and a way to receive warnings before the next storm arrives.
item.dc:creator: Sullivan County Emergency Management

item.title: Sullivan County Employee Food Drive
item.description: Sullivan County employees organize a food drive to support the local community during the holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Nick Johnson

item.title: Blountville Little League Volunteers Needed
item.description: Blountville Little League is seeking volunteers for the upcoming season. Community members are encouraged to get involved.
item.dc:creator: Nick Johnson

item.title: Affidavit Sullivan Co Public Notice
item.description: Public notice affidavit issued by Sullivan County for official county business.
item.dc:creator: Nick Johnson

item.title: Hotel/Motel Tax Law Update
item.description: New law regarding hotel/motel tax effective July 1, 2025. Important update for hospitality businesses in Sullivan County.
item.dc:creator: Nick Johnson

item.title: Building Inspector & Code Enforcement Job Opening
item.description: Sullivan County is hiring a Building Inspector and Code Enforcement Officer. Qualified candidates are encouraged to apply.
item.dc:creator: Nick Johnson

item.title: Household Hazardous Waste Collection Event
item.description: Free household hazardous waste collection event at Sullivan Central Middle School. Residents can safely dispose of hazardous materials.
item.dc:creator: Sullivan County

item.title: GIS Interactive Zoning Map Now Available
item.description: Sullivan County's interactive GIS zoning map is now available online. Search by address and view zoning designations.
item.dc:creator: Sullivan County
